title: SimilarWeb Website Traffic Scraper
description: Provide a list of domains to scrape public SimilarWeb traffic and analytics data. The default sample uses one domain for a fast, low-cost test run.

domains.title: Domains
domains.description: List of website domains to scrape (e.g. openai.com). Enter domains without https:// or www.

maxResults.title: Max Results
maxResults.description: Maximum number of domains to scrape from the list. Start with 1 for a fast, low-cost test.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy settings. Residential proxies are strongly recommended for SimilarWeb. Proxy traffic may be billed as platform usage.
